        dpi_info.setStyleSheet("color: gray; font-size: 11px;")

        layout.addWidget(font_group)
        
        # Spanish character test group
        spanish_group = QGroupBox("Spanish Character Support")
        spanish_layout = QVBoxLayout(spanish_group)
        
        self.character_test_label = QLabel("Testing...")
        self.character_test_label.setWordWrap(True)
        spanish_layout.addWidget(self.character_test_label)
        
        test_button = QPushButton("Test Current Font")
        test_button.clicked.connect(self.test_spanish_characters)
        spanish_layout.addWidget(test_button)

        # Debug info group
        debug_group = QGroupBox("Debug Information")

        self.debug_text = QTextEdit()
        self.debug_text.setMaximumHeight(200)
        self.debug_text.setReadOnly(True)
        debug_layout.addWidget(self.debug_text)
        
        refresh_debug_btn = QPushButton("Refresh Debug Info")
        refresh_debug_btn.clicked.connect(self.update_debug_info)

    def create_content_panel(self) -> QWidget:
        """Create the content demonstration panel"""
        panel = QWidget()
        layout = QVBoxLayout(panel)
        
        # Create tabs for different content types
        tabs = QTabWidget()
        
        # Text content tab
        text_tab = self.create_text_content_tab()
        tabs.addTab(text_tab, "Text Content")
        
        # Exercise simulation tab
        exercise_tab = self.create_exercise_tab()
        tabs.addTab(exercise_tab, "Exercise Simulation")
        
        # Font comparison tab
        comparison_tab = self.create_font_comparison_tab()
        tabs.addTab(comparison_tab, "Font Comparison")
        
        layout.addWidget(tabs)
        
        return panel
    
    def create_text_content_tab(self) -> QWidget:
        """Create tab with text content for font testing"""
        tab = QWidget()
        layout = QVBoxLayout(tab)
        
        # Title
        self.title_label = QLabel(self.spanish_content['title'])
        layout.addWidget(self.title_label)
        
        # Subtitle
        self.subtitle_label = QLabel(self.spanish_content['subtitle'])
        layout.addWidget(self.subtitle_label)
        
        # Separator
        layout.addWidget(QLabel("─" * 80))
        
        # Main content
        self.content_text = QTextEdit()
        self.content_text.setPlainText(self.spanish_content['sample_text'])
        self.content_text.setMinimumHeight(400)
        layout.addWidget(self.content_text)
        
        return tab
    
    def create_exercise_tab(self) -> QWidget:
        """Create tab simulating exercise interface"""
        tab = QWidget()
        layout = QVBoxLayout(tab)
        
        # Exercise question
        exercise_group = QGroupBox("Exercise")
        exercise_layout = QVBoxLayout(exercise_group)
        
        self.exercise_label = QLabel(self.spanish_content['exercise'])
        self.exercise_label.setWordWrap(True)
        exercise_layout.addWidget(self.exercise_label)
        
        # Answer input simulation
        answer_label = QLabel("Your answer:")
        exercise_layout.addWidget(answer_label)
        
        from PyQt5.QtWidgets import QLineEdit
        self.answer_input = QLineEdit()
        self.answer_input.setPlaceholderText("Type your answer here...")
        exercise_layout.addWidget(self.answer_input)
        
        layout.addWidget(exercise_group)
        
        # Feedback section
        feedback_group = QGroupBox("Feedback")
        feedback_layout = QVBoxLayout(feedback_group)
        
        self.feedback_label = QLabel(self.spanish_content['feedback'])
        self.feedback_label.setWordWrap(True)
        feedback_layout.addWidget(self.feedback_label)
        
        layout.addWidget(feedback_group)
        
        layout.addStretch()
        
        return tab
    
    def create_font_comparison_tab(self) -> QWidget:
        """Create tab comparing different fonts"""
        tab = QWidget()
        layout = QVBoxLayout(tab)
        
        scroll_area = QScrollArea()
        scroll_widget = QWidget()
        scroll_layout = QVBoxLayout(scroll_widget)
        
        test_text = "¡Hola! ¿Cómo estás? Ñoño güeña años corazón"
        
        # Compare top 5 Spanish fonts
        recommended_fonts = self.font_manager.get_recommended_fonts()[:5]
        
        for font_name in recommended_fonts:
            # Get Spanish support info
            support_info = self.font_manager.get_spanish_character_support(font_name)
            
            group = QGroupBox(f"{font_name} (Support: {support_info.quality_score:.1%})")
            group_layout = QVBoxLayout(group)
            
            # Sample text with this font
            sample_label = QLabel(test_text)
            font = QFont(font_name, 14)
            sample_label.setFont(font)
            group_layout.addWidget(sample_label)
            
            # Support details
            if support_info.missing_chars:
                missing_label = QLabel(f"Missing: {', '.join(support_info.missing_chars)}")
                missing_label.setStyleSheet("color: red; font-size: 11px;")
                group_layout.addWidget(missing_label)
            else:
                complete_label = QLabel("✓ Complete Spanish support")
                complete_label.setStyleSheet("color: green; font-size: 11px;")
                group_layout.addWidget(complete_label)
            
            scroll_layout.addWidget(group)
        
        scroll_area.setWidget(scroll_widget)
        layout.addWidget(scroll_area)
        
        return tab
    
    def apply_fonts_to_ui(self):
        """Apply font manager fonts to UI elements"""
        # Apply different font sizes to different UI elements
        self.font_manager.apply_font_to_widget(self.title_label, 'extra_large', QFont.Bold)
        self.font_manager.apply_font_to_widget(self.subtitle_label, 'large', QFont.Normal, True)
        self.font_manager.apply_font_to_widget(self.content_text, 'normal')
        self.font_manager.apply_font_to_widget(self.exercise_label, 'medium')
        self.font_manager.apply_font_to_widget(self.feedback_label, 'normal')
        
        # Update debug info
        self.update_debug_info()
        self.test_spanish_characters()
    
    @pyqtSlot()
    def on_font_changed(self):
        """Handle font change signal"""
        self.apply_fonts_to_ui()
        self.statusBar().showMessage("Font changed successfully", 2000)
    
    @pyqtSlot(int)
    def on_font_size_changed(self, size: int):
        """Handle font size change signal"""
        # Update spinbox and slider without triggering signals
        self.size_spinbox.blockSignals(True)
        self.size_slider.blockSignals(True)
        
        self.size_spinbox.setValue(size)
        self.size_slider.setValue(size)
        
        self.size_spinbox.blockSignals(False)
        self.size_slider.blockSignals(False)
        
        self.apply_fonts_to_ui()
    
    def on_font_family_changed(self, font_name: str):
        """Handle font family selection change"""
        if font_name.startswith("---") or font_name.startswith("⭐"):
            font_name = font_name.replace("⭐ ", "").strip()
        
        if font_name in self.font_manager.get_available_fonts():
            self.font_manager.set_font_family(font_name)
            self.statusBar().showMessage(f"Font changed to {font_name}", 2000)
    
    def on_font_size_spinbox_changed(self, size: int):
        """Handle font size spinbox change"""
        self.size_slider.setValue(size)
        self.font_manager.set_base_font_size(size)
    
    def on_font_size_slider_changed(self, size: int):
        """Handle font size slider change"""
        self.size_spinbox.setValue(size)
        self.font_manager.set_base_font_size(size)
    
    def test_spanish_characters(self):
        """Test Spanish character support in current font"""
        config = self.font_manager.get_current_configuration()
        if not config:
            self.character_test_label.setText("No font configuration available")
            return
        
        support_info = self.font_manager.get_spanish_character_support(config.family)
        
        if support_info.supports_spanish:
            result_text = f"✓ {config.family} has complete Spanish support ({support_info.quality_score:.1%})"
            self.character_test_label.setStyleSheet("color: green;")
        else:
            missing = ", ".join(support_info.missing_chars)
            result_text = f"⚠ {config.family} missing: {missing} ({support_info.quality_score:.1%} support)"
            self.character_test_label.setStyleSheet("color: orange;")
        
        self.character_test_label.setText(result_text)
    
    def update_debug_info(self):
        """Update debug information display"""
        debug_info = self.font_manager.get_debug_info()
        
        formatted_info = f"""
Current Configuration:
• Family: {debug_info['current_config']['family'] if debug_info['current_config'] else 'None'}
• Size: {debug_info['current_config']['size'] if debug_info['current_config'] else 'None'}pt
• DPI Scale: {debug_info['dpi_scale']:.2f}
• System DPI: {debug_info['system_dpi']}

System Information:
• Platform: {debug_info['platform']}
• Available Fonts: {debug_info['available_fonts_count']}
• Spanish-optimized Fonts: {debug_info['spanish_fonts_count']}
• Windows Features: {debug_info['windows_available']}

Performance:
• Font Cache Size: {debug_info['font_cache_size']}
• Metrics Cache Size: {debug_info['metrics_cache_size']}

Top Spanish Fonts:
{chr(10).join([f'• {name}: {score:.1%}' for name, score in debug_info['top_spanish_fonts']])}
        """.strip()
        
        self.debug_text.setPlainText(formatted_info)
    
    def run_performance_test(self):
        """Run a performance test on font operations"""
        import time
        
        self.perf_results.setText("Running performance test...")
        QApplication.processEvents()
        
        # Test font creation performance
        start_time = time.time()
        test_fonts = []
        
        for i in range(100):
            font = self.font_manager.get_font('normal')
            metrics = self.font_manager.get_font_metrics(font)
            test_fonts.append((font, metrics))
        
        creation_time = time.time() - start_time
        
        # Test Spanish character validation
        start_time = time.time()
        validator = SpanishCharacterValidator()
        
        test_results = []
        for font_name in self.font_manager.get_recommended_fonts()[:10]:
            result = validator.validate_spanish_support(QFont(font_name))
            test_results.append(result)
        
        validation_time = time.time() - start_time
        
        # Display results
        results_text = f"""
Performance Test Results:

• Font Creation (100 fonts): {creation_time:.3f}s
• Avg per font: {creation_time/100*1000:.2f}ms
• Spanish Validation (10 fonts): {validation_time:.3f}s
• Avg per validation: {validation_time/10*1000:.2f}ms

Cache Status:
• Font cache size: {len(self.font_manager._font_cache)}
• Metrics cache size: {len(self.font_manager._metrics_cache)}
        """.strip()
        
        self.perf_results.setText(results_text)


def main():
    """Main function to run the font integration demo"""
    # Set up logging
    logging.basicConfig(
        level=logging.INFO,
        format='%(asctime)s - %(name)s - %(levelname)s - %(message)s'
    )
    
    # Create application
    app = QApplication(sys.argv)
    
    # Create and show demo window
    demo = FontIntegrationDemo()
    demo.show()
    
    # Run application
    sys.exit(app.exec_())


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()
